goal: Build a 3×3 grid palletizer: a Franka Panda picks 9 cubes from a conveyor and stacks them in a 3×3 grid on top of a 0.45×0.45m pallet behind the robot. Scales the CP-08 pattern (compute_stack_placement + drop_targets dict) from 4 to 9 cubes. Stress-tests cuRobo's planning at the edge of reach (0.51m to corner cubes).
thoughts:
Six 3x3-palletizer specifics for CP-10 (extends CP-08 — orientation rule, cuRobo, drop_targets dict pattern, settle_state all inherited):
1) Pallet 0.45x0.45x0.05m at [0, -0.4, 0.775] (vs CP-08's 0.30x0.30) — accommodates 3x3 grid with 0.10m spacing for 5cm cubes.
2) compute_stack_placement(target='/World/Pallet', pattern='grid_3x3', n_items=9, cube_size=0.05, spacing=0.10, anchor='top') yields 9 positions: xy={-0.10,0,0.10}×{-0.5,-0.4,-0.3}, all at z=0.825.
3) Reach check: furthest corner cube at (0.1, -0.5) → sqrt(0.01+0.25)=0.51m from robot base — well within Franka's 0.85m reach.
4) Spacing 0.10m (vs 0.08m in CP-08) for 5cm cubes — gives 0.05m gap. Larger gap accommodates 8 cubes worth of cumulative drop-precision drift.
5) 9 cubes on 6m conveyor at x ∈ [-2.7..-0.3] in 0.30m increments. First few start outside robot reach (|x|>0.7), later ones inside. Sequential pickup either way.
6) drop_targets dict has 9 entries — Cube_N → grid slot N. _bin_drop_pos(cube_path) lookup is O(1).
code:
# DomeLight + parent Xform + table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Franka — same pose as CP-01
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Wider conveyor (6m) for 9 cubes at 0.30m spacing
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[6.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# 9 cubes spaced 0.30m
for i, x in enumerate([-2.7, -2.4, -2.1, -1.8, -1.5, -1.2, -0.9, -0.6, -0.3]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(9)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(9)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Pallet 0.45x0.45x0.05m
# Cube primitive default size=2; scale=[0.225, 0.225, 0.025] → 0.45x0.45x0.05m
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pallet", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.225, 0.225, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pallet", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Pick sensor
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# cuRobo controller with 9-entry drop_targets dict.
# Positions computed via:
#   compute_stack_placement(target='/World/Pallet', pattern='grid_3x3',
#                            n_items=9, cube_size=0.05, spacing=0.10, anchor='top')
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(9)],
    destination_path="/World/Pallet",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Cube_1": [-0.10, -0.50, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_2": [ 0.00, -0.50, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_3": [ 0.10, -0.50, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_4": [-0.10, -0.40, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_5": [ 0.00, -0.40, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_6": [ 0.10, -0.40, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_7": [-0.10, -0.30, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_8": [ 0.00, -0.30, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_9": [ 0.10, -0.30, 0.825],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Pallet"],
)
extension_notes: CP-10 scales CP-08's 4-cube grid_2x2 to 9-cube grid_3x3. Same code pattern. Validates compute_stack_placement at scale and drop_targets dict with 9 entries. Function-gate timing: 9 cubes × ~10s/cube ≈ 90-180s. Stack stability not asserted (cubes are loose 5cm rubber on flat pallet — may settle into staggered positions if drop precision drifts).
failure_modes: Cubes_7..9 start within Franka reach immediately — controller picks them out of conveyor order. Verifier still passes if Cube_1 reaches pallet eventually.
Cumulative drop precision drift — 9 sequential drops at 1-2cm-each-error compounds. Last cube may drift outside its grid slot. Spacing 0.10m gives 5cm margin — should hold.
Pallet too small for 3x3 + spacing — verify pallet xy ≥ 3*spacing + cube_size = 0.35m. Used 0.45m for safety.
drop_targets dict missing some cube — falls through to DEST_PATH (pallet bbox center), all unmapped cubes pile up at center.
Conveyor not wide enough — Cube_1 starts at x=-2.7, conveyor [-3, +3] = 6m. Within bound.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-08; form-gate verification pending; function-gate (9 cubes delivered to grid slots) probably stochastic given CP-09 experience; long sim (180s) needed
